metadata.title: Ibrahim Dayende OUGDA - Full-stack Dev & Growth Media Buyer
metadata.description: I build modern web and mobile products, automate with AI, and help brands grow with Meta & Google Ads.

hero.eyebrow: Digital products, acquisition, and AI automation
hero.description: I help startups, founders, and brands launch solid web and mobile products, automate operations with AI, and drive measurable acquisition results.

projectsDelivered.label: projects delivered
projectsDelivered.detail: Web, mobile, and internal tools shipped for real-world usage.

adsCampaigns.label: campaigns managed
adsCampaigns.detail: Meta & Google Ads handled with ROI logic and ongoing optimization.

aiAutomations.label: AI automations
aiAutomations.detail: Operational workflows connected to your tools to save actual time.

spotlight.title: Structured execution, not a generic portfolio.
spotlight.description: I shape projects to reduce ambiguity and deliver something useful as early as possible.

build.title: Build
build.description: Web products, apps, and business interfaces designed for actual use.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Acquisition, tracking, and automation to move the business forward.

ship.title: Ship cleanly
ship.description: Clear scoping, fast iterations, and direct communication.

availability.title: Available for focused engagements
availability.description: Reply within 24 to 48 hours with concrete feedback on feasibility, scope, and the best next step.

stats.intro: A few markers to understand the kind of missions I take on and the range I operate in.
stats.projectsDeliveredDetail: Products shipped or used in real operational contexts.
stats.adsCampaignsDetail: Campaigns tracked with reporting and continuous optimization.
stats.communitiesDetail: Brand communities supported with ongoing digital presence.
stats.aiAutomationsDetail: Automated workflows connected to business tools.

services.title: What I can design, launch, and improve with you
services.description: I combine product thinking, technical execution, and acquisition so a project can move forward without too many handoffs.

web.title: Clear and robust web products
web.description: Sites, dashboards, and applications designed to be fast, maintainable, and genuinely useful to your business.
web.benefit: You get a solid base to launch, test, or evolve a product without rebuilding everything later.
web.proof: Typical stack: Next.js, Laravel, Node.js, API integrations.

mobile.title: Mobile apps ready for real use
mobile.description: Flutter apps connected to your APIs, designed for actual field usage, smooth flows, and maintainable evolution.
mobile.benefit: You reduce friction for users while keeping a coherent technical base for what comes next.
mobile.proof: Approach: simple mobile UX, reliable API layer, readable business logic.

ads.title: Acquisition driven by data
ads.description: Meta and Google Ads campaigns built to produce real business signals, not just flattering surface metrics.
ads.benefit: You invest with a clearer view of ROI, ongoing tests, and better decision-making signals.
ads.proof: Tracking, campaign structure, creative iteration, and continuous optimization.

ai.title: AI automations that help daily work
ai.description: Automations that connect tools, reduce repetitive tasks, and speed up operations without overengineering the system.
ai.benefit: You save operational time where repetition, delays, or information loss hurt the most.
ai.proof: Make, n8n, APIs, bots, business workflows, and tailored integrations.

panel.title: A technical partner who keeps the business view in focus
panel.description: The goal is not only to produce screens or code. The goal is to move fast with clear priorities and something usable at each step.

scoping.title: Useful scoping
scoping.description: We clarify the need, constraints, and ambition level before building.

delivery.title: Iterative delivery
delivery.description: You see something concrete early, then we improve from real feedback.

support.title: Readable decisions
support.description: I favor technical choices that are defendable and understandable on the business side.

projects.title: Concrete projects, measurable impact
projects.description: Solutions designed to solve real problems, with a focus on performance and growth.
projects.ctaPrompt: Have a similar project in mind?
projects.featuredDescription: The strongest examples of my approach: product clarity, concrete impact, and clean execution.
projects.allProjectsDescription: An additional selection showing a wider range of contexts, stacks, and business problems.

meta-ads-conversations.title: Meta Ads Campaigns - Conversation & Engagement Generation
meta-ads-conversations.description: Management and optimization of Facebook & Instagram ad campaigns focused on WhatsApp & Messenger conversations and engagement. Daily and lifetime budgets, CPC, cost per conversation, reach, impressions, and continuous optimization.
meta-ads-conversations.impact: Impact: 3.6M+ impressions, 577k+ people reached -> stronger visibility; 5,000+ WhatsApp & Messenger conversations -> higher engagement; cost per conversation as low as $0.18 -> efficient ROI.

kawari-finance-app.title: Kawari Finance App
kawari-finance-app.description: Finance management app to track expenses and income and visualize budgets with AI.
kawari-finance-app.impact: Impact: budget visibility -> clearer decisions; AI recommendations -> better financial discipline.

sud-stratvision.title: SUD-StratVision - Strategic Management Platform
sud-stratvision.description: Strategic management platform centralizing goals, performance, leave, training, and missions through an interactive dashboard.
sud-stratvision.impact: Impact: centralized objectives -> faster decisions; HR tracking -> optimized management.

clinic-appointment-scheduler.title: Clinic Appointment Scheduler
clinic-appointment-scheduler.description: Mobile app for booking, managing, and tracking medical appointments for patients, doctors, and admins.
clinic-appointment-scheduler.impact: Impact: appointment digitization -> smoother patient journey; real-time tracking -> stronger clinic coordination.

offline-gpt.title: Offline GPT
offline-gpt.description: Research project to run a GPT-like assistant locally without internet access.
offline-gpt.impact: Impact: offline AI solutions -> increased accessibility in low-connectivity contexts.
offline-gpt.microcopy: Work in progress - contributions and feedback welcome.

make-social-automation.title: Social Media Posting Automation (Facebook & Instagram)
make-social-automation.description: Full social media posting automation using Make (formerly Integromat). The system fetches content from Google Sheets, posts to Facebook Pages and Instagram Business, and updates status in the tracking sheet.
make-social-automation.impact: Impact: significant time savings -> faster operations; reduced human errors -> consistent quality; centralized multi-platform publishing -> scalable workflow.

telegram-youtube-summarizer.title: AI Telegram Bot - Automatic YouTube Video Summaries
telegram-youtube-summarizer.description: AI Telegram bot that detects YouTube links, fetches transcripts via API, cleans the text, generates AI summaries, and returns clear, formatted responses.
telegram-youtube-summarizer.impact: Impact: automated video summaries -> time saved; faster monitoring -> better learning; modular architecture -> easy evolution.

bfa-administration-assistant.title: BFA Administration Assistant
bfa-administration-assistant.description: Digital admin assistant to manage tasks and administrative data in a local institutional context.
bfa-administration-assistant.impact: Impact: fewer manual tasks -> time saved for agents; formalized processes -> more reliable service.

sud-develop-website.title: SUD Develop Website
sud-develop-website.description: Multilingual corporate website presenting divisions, products, news, and services with a quote request module.
sud-develop-website.impact: Impact: stronger digital visibility -> more qualified leads; clearer offer -> improved conversion.

anam-meteo-eval.title: ANAM Meteo Eval
anam-meteo-eval.description: Project to analyze and evaluate weather data to measure quality, reliability, and consistency.
anam-meteo-eval.impact: Impact: continuous evaluation -> improved data quality; reliable indicators -> stronger climate decisions.

cv-studio.title: CV Studio
cv-studio.description: Web app to create and customize modern resumes through an interactive interface.
cv-studio.impact: Impact: profile valorization -> improved employability; guided creation -> smooth user experience.

gestion-bibliotheque.title: Library Management
gestion-bibliotheque.description: Library management system to track books, loans, and users through a secure interface.
gestion-bibliotheque.impact: Impact: loan tracking -> fewer losses; automated operations -> time savings.

bytemarket.title: ByteMarket
bytemarket.description: E-commerce site built in vanilla HTML/CSS/JS with clear product navigation and a smooth checkout experience.
bytemarket.impact: Impact: simplified purchase flow -> higher conversion; clear catalog -> faster navigation.

about.title: A hybrid profile to turn an idea into something usable
about.description: I combine product thinking, technical execution, and business awareness to move a project forward without wasting time in ambiguity.

product.title: Prioritize what actually matters
product.description: I focus first on what needs to exist to create value, not what looks impressive at first glance.

execution.title: Move fast without damaging the future
execution.description: The goal is to move quickly with a base that stays clean, readable, and strong enough to evolve.

growth.title: Connect technical work to outcomes
growth.description: I keep a direct link between what gets built, what gets measured, and what changes for the business.

approach.title: Direct communication, clear decisions, short iterations
approach.description: I prefer a simple operating model: clarify the need, make priorities visible, deliver something concrete, then improve from reality.

profile.title: Full-stack, mobile, and automation builder
profile.description: I work on web products, mobile apps, AI automations, and acquisition topics when keeping a coherent view between tech and performance matters.

achievement.title: Winner of the 2025 AI Hackathon (MTDPCE)
achievement.description: ANAM Meteo project awarded at the 2025 AI Hackathon organized by the Ministry of Digital Transition, Posts and Electronic Communications (MTDPCE), then delivered to the National Meteorological Agency.

location.title: Base
location.description: Based in West Africa, with experience working on both local and international projects.

collaboration.title: Engagement style
collaboration.description: Freelance work, focused missions, product support, or reinforcement on a critical slice of the project.

response.title: Responsiveness
response.description: Reply within 24 to 48 hours with a concrete view on scope, feasibility, and realistic options.

contact.title: Let's talk about your next project
contact.subtitle: Describe your needs and I will get back to you within 48h with a clear proposal.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Project goal, desired timeline, approximate budget (optional)...

errors.name: Name is required.
errors.submit: Something went wrong. Please try again.

form.success: Thanks! I will get back to you within 48h.

quick.title: Pick the fastest way to reach out
quick.description: If the need is already clear, WhatsApp is the fastest way to start the conversation.
quick.whatsappHint: Ideal for a quick first exchange
